name: Headless Audit Narrative
description: Audit current marketing ops and recommend headless architecture wins.

script.text: Give me a fast audit of our current campaign stack.
You have duplicated audiences across email and paid media, disconnected DE audiences, and no shared journey orchestration layer.

script.title: Audit Findings
script.text: Opportunity: unify audience graph, orchestration logic, and analytics dashboards in one headless layer.
With this approach, your team can launch tailored experiences in days instead of weeks.
